title: pteris × duvalii
intro: Pteris × duvalii, a hybrid of the Pteris species, is a type of fern commonly known as the Duval's fern or Christmas fern. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris × duvalii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
